description: Every RevenueCat v2 endpoint, plus a local database, offline search, and revenue/churn/refund intelligence the dashboard charts can't compose.

tools.name: apps_create
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id.

tools.name: apps_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: apps_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id.

tools.name: apps_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListApps.

tools.name: apps_update
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id. Optional: amazon, app_store, mac_app_store (plus 6 more).

params.name: amazon-package-name
params.description: The package name of the app

params.name: amazon-shared-secret
params.description: Your Amazon Developer Identity Shared Key

params.name: app-store-app-store-connect-api-key
params.description: App Store Connect API Key downloaded from App Store Connect in PEM format. Copy the contents of the file in this field. This is optional and used for advanced features like product imports.

params.name: app-store-app-store-connect-api-key-id
params.description: App Store Connect API Key ID. The ID of the downloaded API key. You can get it from App Store Connect.

params.name: app-store-app-store-connect-api-key-issuer
params.description: App Store Connect API Key Issuer ID.

params.name: app-store-app-store-connect-vendor-number
params.description: Your vendor number from App Store Connect. Required for some features like financial reports.

params.name: app-store-bundle-id
params.description: The bundle ID of the app

params.name: app-store-shared-secret
params.description: The shared secret of the app

params.name: app-store-subscription-key-id
params.description: In App Key id. The ID of the downloaded in app key. You can get it from App Store Connect

params.name: app-store-subscription-key-issuer
params.description: The key Issuer id. See instructions on how to obtain this in https://www.revenuecat.com/docs/in-app-purchase-key-configuration#3-providing-the-issuer-id-to-revenuecat

params.name: mac-app-store-bundle-id
params.description: The bundle ID of the app

params.name: mac-app-store-shared-secret
params.description: The shared secret of the app

params.name: paddle-paddle-api-key
params.description: Paddle Server-side API key provided on the Paddle dashboard.

params.name: paddle-paddle-is-sandbox
params.description: Whether the app is tied to the sandbox environment.

params.name: play-store-package-name
params.description: The package name of the app

params.name: rc-billing-app-name
params.description: Shown in checkout, emails, and receipts sent to customers.

params.name: rc-billing-stripe-account-id
params.description: It needs to be connected to your RevenueCat account. It can be omitted if you only have a single Stripe account connected to your RevenueCat account.

params.name: rc-billing-support-email
params.description: Used as the `reply to` address in all emails sent to customers, to allow them to receive support. If you leave this field blank, your RevenueCat account email address will be used.

params.name: roku-roku-api-key
params.description: Roku Pay API key provided on the Roku Pay Web Services page.

params.name: roku-roku-channel-id
params.description: Channel ID provided on the Roku Channel page.

params.name: roku-roku-channel-name
params.description: Channel name that is displayed on the Roku Channel page.

params.name: stripe-stripe-account-id
params.description: It needs to be connected to your RevenueCat account. It can be omitted if you only have a single Stripe account connected to your RevenueCat account.

tools.name: apps_public-api-keys_list-app
tools.description: Returns public API keys for the app. RC Checkout public keys are omitted. Sandbox keys are always included. Production keys are omitted when the app uses Stripe or Web Billing and the linked Stripe connected account is sandbox or test-only (same behavior as the RevenueCat dashboard list). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id.

tools.name: apps_store-kit-config_get-app-storekit-config
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:apps:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id. Returns the StoreKitConfigFile.

tools.name: audit-logs_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:audit_logs:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, start_date, end_date (plus 1 more). Returns the ListAuditLogs.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: Cursor for pagination. Returns audit logs after the specified audit log ID, using descending order by audit log ID.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

tools.name: charts_get-data
tools.description: Returns time-series data for a specific chart. **Response Structure** The response includes: - Chart metadata (category, display_name, description) - Time boundaries (start_date, end_date, last_computed_at) - Data values (array of data points) - Summary statistics - Segment information (when segmented) **Chart Types** Different charts may return data in slightly different formats: - Standard charts: values as arrays of data points with timestamps - Cohort charts: values include cohort-specific data structures - Segmented charts: include segment information in the response **Filtering and Segmentation** Use the `/charts/{chart_name}/options` endpoint to discover available filters and segments for a specific chart before making requests. Filter parameters vary by chart and can be passed as additional query parameters. **Aggregation** Use `aggregate` to request summary-only output for supported charts. When `aggregate` is provided, `values` is returned as an empty array and `summary` includes only the requested aggregate operations. **Incomplete data** For the most recent periods, data may be flagged as incomplete, and may not be appropriate to use for analysis. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): charts_metrics:charts:read . This endpoint belongs to the Charts & Metrics domain, which has a default rate limit of 15 requests per minute . Required: project_id, chart_name (default: actives). Optional: realtime (default: true), filters, selectors (plus 8 more).

params.name: chart_name
params.description: Name of the chart to retrieve: - actives: Active (paying) subscriptions - actives_movement: Period-over-period delta of active (paying) subscriptions - actives_new: New paying subscriptions, including trial conversions, resubscriptions, and product changes - arr: Annual recurring revenue - churn: Churn rate: active and expired subscriptions per period - cohort_explorer: allows measuring the performance of various cohort definitions over time for revenue, retained subscriptions, and cohort LTV - conversion_to_paying: Conversion of new customers to paying - customers_new: Newly seen customers - ltv_per_customer: Realized LTV per customer, also known as ARPU, cohorted by first seen date - ltv_per_paying_customer: Realized LTV per paying customer, also known as ARPPU, cohorted by first seen date - mrr: Monthly recurring revenue - mrr_movement: Period-over-period delta of monthly recurring revenue - prediction_explorer: similar to cohort_explorer but including future predictions - refund_rate: transactions per period, refunds, refund rate - revenue: revenue (gross, net of taxes, or proceeds net of taxes and commissions) and number of transactions (subscriptions and non-subscriptions) per period - subscription_retention: Per-period retention of paying subscriptions by duration - subscription_status: Break down paying subscriptions, trials, MRR, ARR, or revenue by whether the subscription is set to renew, cancelled, or in billing recovery - trials: Active trials - trials_movement: Movement of active trials - trials_new: New trials - customers_active: Customers seen during the period (also known as DAU/MAU/WAU/etc.) - trial_conversion_rate: Number of trials started in a period and ratio of them converting to paying - non-subscription_purchases: Number of non-subscription purchases per period

params.name: realtime
params.description: Whether to request real-time (v3) charts. Defaults to true. Set to false to request the v2 charts.

params.name: filters
params.description: JSON array of chart filters. Each filter is a ChartFilter object.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Comma-separated aggregate operations to return in `summary` without raw `values`.

params.name: currency
params.description: The currency to return metrics data in

params.name: resolution
params.description: Time resolution for the chart data. Use the chart options endpoint to discover available resolutions and their IDs.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: segment
params.description: Segment the data by this dimension. Use the chart options endpoint to discover available segments for a chart.

params.name: limit_num_segments
params.description: If set, limits the number of segments returned to the top N by value. All remaining segments are aggregated into an 'Other' segment. Only applies when a segment is specified.

params.name: include_annotations
params.description: When true, includes chart annotations for the project in the response, filtered to the chart's date window.

tools.name: charts_options_get-chart
tools.description: Returns configuration options for a specific chart. Use this endpoint to discover: - **Resolutions**: Available time granularities (day, week, month, etc.) - **Segments**: Dimensions you can segment the data by (country, store, product, etc.) - **Filters**: Available filters and their possible values The options returned are specific to the chart and may vary based on your project's data and configuration. **Usage** Call this endpoint before requesting chart data to: 1. Build dynamic filter UIs 2. Validate parameters before making chart data requests 3. Discover available dimensions for analysis . This endpoint requires the following permission(s): charts_metrics:charts:read . This endpoint belongs to the Charts & Metrics domain, which has a default rate limit of 15 requests per minute . Required: project_id, chart_name (default: actives). Optional: realtime (default: true).

params.name: chart_name
params.description: Name of the chart to retrieve: - actives: Active (paying) subscriptions - actives_movement: Period-over-period delta of active (paying) subscriptions - actives_new: New paying subscriptions, including trial conversions, resubscriptions, and product changes - arr: Annual recurring revenue - churn: Churn rate: active and expired subscriptions per period - cohort_explorer: allows measuring the performance of various cohort definitions over time for revenue, retained subscriptions, and cohort LTV - conversion_to_paying: Conversion of new customers to paying - customers_new: Newly seen customers - ltv_per_customer: Realized LTV per customer, also known as ARPU, cohorted by first seen date - ltv_per_paying_customer: Realized LTV per paying customer, also known as ARPPU, cohorted by first seen date - mrr: Monthly recurring revenue - mrr_movement: Period-over-period delta of monthly recurring revenue - prediction_explorer: similar to cohort_explorer but including future predictions - refund_rate: transactions per period, refunds, refund rate - revenue: revenue (gross, net of taxes, or proceeds net of taxes and commissions) and number of transactions (subscriptions and non-subscriptions) per period - subscription_retention: Per-period retention of paying subscriptions by duration - subscription_status: Break down paying subscriptions, trials, MRR, ARR, or revenue by whether the subscription is set to renew, cancelled, or in billing recovery - trials: Active trials - trials_movement: Movement of active trials - trials_new: New trials - customers_active: Customers seen during the period (also known as DAU/MAU/WAU/etc.) - trial_conversion_rate: Number of trials started in a period and ratio of them converting to paying - non-subscription_purchases: Number of non-subscription purchases per period

params.name: realtime
params.description: Whether to request real-time (v3) charts. Defaults to true. Set to false to request the v2 charts.

tools.name: collaborators_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:collaborators:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListCollaborators.

tools.name: customers_create

This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, id. Optional: attributes. Returns the new Customer.

tools.name: customers_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: customers_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Customer.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `attributes` (requires `customer_information:customers:read` permission).

tools.name: customers_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20), search. Returns the ListCustomers.

params.name: search
params.description: Search term. Currently, only searching by email is supported (searching for exact matches in the $email attribute).

tools.name: customers_actions_assign-customer-offering
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read , customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, offering_id.

params.name: offering_id
params.description: The ID of the offering to assign to the customer. Set to null to clear any existing override.

tools.name: customers_actions_grant-customer-entitlement
tools.description: Grants an entitlement to a customer unless one already exists. As a side effect, a promotional subscription is created. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, entitlement_id, expires_at. Returns the new Customer.

params.name: entitlement_id
params.description: The ID of the entitlement to grant to the customer.

params.name: expires_at
params.description: The date after which the access to the entitlement expires in ms since epoch.

tools.name: customers_actions_restore-purchase-by-order-id
tools.description: Restores a Google Play purchase to the specified customer using a Google Play order ID. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, order_id. Returns the new Customer.

params.name: order_id
params.description: The Google Play order ID to restore.

tools.name: customers_actions_revoke-customer-granted-entitlement
tools.description: Revokes a granted entitlement from a customer. As a side effect, the promotional subscription associated with the granted entitlement is expired. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, entitlement_id. Returns the new Customer.

params.name: entitlement_id
params.description: The ID of the granted entitlement to revoke from the customer.

tools.name: customers_actions_transfer-customer-data
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write , customer_information:subscriptions:read_write , customer_information:purchases:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, target_customer_id. Optional: app_ids. Returns the new Transfer.

params.name: app_ids
params.description: Optional. The IDs of the apps to filter the transfer by. When specified, only purchases and subscriptions associated with these apps will be transferred.

params.name: target_customer_id
params.description: The ID of the customer to whom the subscriptions and one-time purchases will be transferred.

tools.name: customers_active-entitlements_list-customer
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListCustomerActiveEntitlements.

tools.name: customers_aliases_list-customer
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListCustomerAliases.

tools.name: customers_attributes_list-customer
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListCustomerAttributes.

tools.name: customers_attributes_set-customer
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, attributes. Returns the new ListCustomerAttributes.

tools.name: customers_customer-center_get-config
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:customers:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: platform, locale. Returns the CustomerCenterConfig.

params.name: platform
params.description: The platform to process the Customer Center configuration for. When provided, returns the locale-selected, platform-filtered configuration the customer would see. When omitted, returns the full unprocessed configuration for all platforms. Must match a store configured on this project.

params.name: locale
params.description: BCP 47 locale string (e.g. en_US) used to select the appropriate localization when platform is provided. When omitted, the configuration's default locale is used. Has no effect if platform is not provided.

tools.name: customers_invoices_get

This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id. Optional: include_empty_balances, starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListVirtualCurrenciesBalances.

tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:purchases:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Virtual Currencies - Create Transaction domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, customer_id, adjustments. Optional: include_empty_balances, reference. Returns the new ListVirtualCurrenciesBalances.

tools.name: entitlements_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:entitlements:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, entitlement_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: entitlements_get

This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, entitlement_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Entitlement.

Returns the new MediaAsset.

tools.name: metrics_get-overview
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): charts_metrics:overview:read . This endpoint belongs to the Charts & Metrics domain, which has a default rate limit of 15 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: currency. Returns the OverviewMetrics.

params.name: currency
params.description: The currency to return metrics data in

tools.name: metrics_get-revenue
tools.description: Returns the total revenue for the project across all of its apps for the given inclusive date range `[start_date, end_date]`. The value is expressed in the project's primary currency unless `currency` is provided. This endpoint is backed by the same realtime (v3) revenue chart that powers the dashboard. It is intended for cases where an app needs an authoritative revenue total without inferring it from the transaction list. Note that the most recent day in the range may be partial if it includes today, since transactions for today are still arriving. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): charts_metrics:overview:read . This endpoint belongs to the Charts & Metrics domain, which has a default rate limit of 15 requests per minute . Required: project_id, start_date, end_date. Optional: currency.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Start date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: end_date
params.description: End date for the data range (ISO 8601 format)

params.name: currency
params.description: The currency to return metrics data in

tools.name: offerings_create
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, display_name, lookup_key. Optional: metadata. Returns the new Offering.

params.name: lookup_key
params.description: The custom identifier of the offering

tools.name: offerings_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: offerings_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Offering.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `package` (requires `project_configuration:packages:read` permission), `package.product` (requires `project_configuration:products:read` permission).

tools.name: offerings_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20), expand. Returns the ListOfferings.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `items.package` (requires `project_configuration:packages:read` permission), `items.package.product` (requires `project_configuration:products:read` permission).

tools.name: offerings_update
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Optional: display_name, is_current, metadata. Returns the new Offering.

params.name: display_name
params.description: The display name of the offering

params.name: is_current
params.description: Indicates if the offering is the current offering

tools.name: offerings_actions_archive-offering
tools.description: Archives an offering (makes it inactive). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Returns the new Offering.

tools.name: offerings_actions_unarchive-offering
tools.description: Unarchives an offering (makes it active). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Optional: unarchive_referenced_entities (default: false). Returns the new Offering.

params.name: unarchive_referenced_entities
params.description: If true, also unarchive any archived products referenced by this offering's packages.

tools.name: offerings_packages_create
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id, display_name, lookup_key. Optional: position. Returns the new Package.

params.name: display_name
params.description: The display name of the package

params.name: position
params.description: The position of the package in the offering

tools.name: offerings_packages_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, offering_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20), expand. Returns the ListPackages.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `items.product` (requires `project_configuration:products:read` permission).

tools.name: packages_delete-from-offering
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: packages_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Package.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `product` (requires `project_configuration:products:read` permission).

tools.name: packages_update
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id. Optional: display_name, position. Returns the new Package.

params.name: display_name
params.description: The display name of the package

params.name: position
params.description: The position of the package within the offering

tools.name: packages_actions_attach-products-to-package
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id, products. Returns the new Package.

tools.name: packages_actions_detach-products-from-package
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id, product_ids. Returns the new Package.

params.name: product_ids
params.description: IDs of the products to detach from the package

tools.name: packages_products_get-from-package
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:packages:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, package_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ProductsFromPackage.

tools.name: paywalls_create
tools.description: Create a paywall draft for a project. You can either use the offering template shortcut or provide full draft components directly. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Returns the new Paywall.

tools.name: paywalls_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, paywall_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: paywalls_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, paywall_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Paywall.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `offering` (requires `project_configuration:offerings:read` permission), `components` (requires `project_configuration:offerings:read` permission).

tools.name: paywalls_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20), expand. Returns the ListPaywalls.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `items.offering` (requires `project_configuration:offerings:read` permission).

tools.name: paywalls_update
tools.description: Update a paywall draft. If the paywall is already published, this updates its draft version without changing the published version. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:offerings:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, paywall_id, components_config, components_localizations, default_locale, revision. Optional: automatically_scale_font_size, name. Returns the updated Paywall.

params.name: automatically_scale_font_size
params.description: Whether font sizes should automatically scale for this paywall draft.

params.name: components_config
params.description: The raw paywall components configuration to save as the draft.

params.name: components_localizations
params.description: Localized component values keyed by locale.

params.name: default_locale
params.description: The default locale for this paywall.

params.name: revision
params.description: The current draft revision. Used to reject stale writes.

tools.name: products_create
tools.description: Warning This endpoint does not allow to create Web Billing products. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, app_id, store_identifier, type. Optional: display_name, subscription, title. Returns the new Product.

params.name: display_name
params.description: The display name of the product

params.name: store_identifier
params.description: The store identifier of the product. - For Apple App Store products this is the product ID of the subscription or in-app product. - For Google's Play Store, it should follow the format 'productId:basePlanId' for subscription products and SKU for one-time purchase products. - For Stripe, the product identifier that always starts with 'prod_' - For Amazon, if it's a subscription, the term SKU of the subscription. If it's a one-time purchase, the SKU of the product. - For Roku, this is the product identifier of the subscription or one-time purchase product.

params.name: subscription-duration
params.description: The duration of the product subscription. This field is only supported for the test store and it is ignored for other stores.

params.name: title
params.description: The user-facing title of the product. This field is required for Test Store products.

tools.name: products_delete
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: products_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Optional: expand. Returns the Product.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `app` (requires `project_configuration:apps:read` permission).

tools.name: products_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: app_id, starting_after, limit (default: 20) (plus 1 more). Returns the ListProducts.

params.name: app_id
params.description: This is an optional query parameter to get a list of products of a given entitlement associated with a particular app

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded. Accepted values are: `items.app` (requires `project_configuration:apps:read` permission).

tools.name: products_update
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Optional: expand, display_name. Returns the new Product.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: display_name
params.description: The display name of the product

tools.name: products_actions_archive-product
tools.description: Archives a product (makes it inactive). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Returns the new Product.

tools.name: products_actions_unarchive-product
tools.description: Unarchives a product (makes it active). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Returns the new Product.

tools.name: products_create-in-store_create-product-in-store
tools.description: Push a product to the App Store. **For subscription products**: You must provide store information including duration and subscription group details. **For in-app purchase products** (consumable, non-consumable, non-renewing subscription): No request body is required. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:products:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, product_id. Optional: store_information. Returns the new CreateInStoreCreateProductInStoreResponse.

params.name: store_information
params.description: Store-specific information for creating the product in the store

tools.name: projects_create
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:projects:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: name. Returns the new Project.

tools.name: projects_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:projects:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListProjects.

tools.name: purchases_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:purchases:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, purchase_id. Returns the Purchase.

tools.name: purchases_search
tools.description: Search for a one-time purchases by any of its associated `store_purchase_identifier` values. For example, this may include the `transactionId` of any transaction in an Apple App Store purchase, or any order ID from a Google Play Store purchase. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:purchases:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, store_purchase_identifier. Returns the ListPurchases.

params.name: store_purchase_identifier
params.description: Store ID associated with the one-time purchase.

tools.name: purchases_actions_refund-purchase
tools.description: Refund a Web Billing purchase and revoke access to associated granted entitlements. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:purchases:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, purchase_id. Returns the new Purchase.

tools.name: purchases_entitlements_list-purchase
tools.description: Lists all Entitlements granted by a Purchase. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:purchases:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, purchase_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListEntitlements.

tools.name: subscriptions_get
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Returns the Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions_search
tools.description: Search for a subscription by any of its associated `store_subscription_identifier` values, whether from a past or current subscription period. For example, this may include the `transactionId` of any transaction in an Apple App Store subscription, or any order ID from a Google Play Store subscription. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, store_subscription_identifier. Returns the ListSubscriptions.

params.name: store_subscription_identifier
params.description: Store ID associated with the subscription for the current or next period.

tools.name: subscriptions_actions_cancel-subscription
tools.description: Cancel an active Web Billing subscription. The customer will lose access to the associated entitlements at the end of the current period. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Returns the new Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions_actions_extend-subscription
tools.description: Extend the current billing period of a subscription. Provide either `extend_by_days` to extend by a number of days, or `extend_until_ms` to extend to an absolute epoch-millisecond timestamp. Supported on Apple Store, Google Play Store, and Web Billing subscriptions. For Apple Store subscriptions, `extend_reason_code` is required and the extension is capped at 90 days. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Returns the new Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions_actions_refund-subscription
tools.description: Cancel a Web Billing subscription by refunding the most recent payment. The customer will immediately lose access to the associated entitlements. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Returns the new Subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions_authenticated-management-url_get-authorized-subscription-management-url
tools.description: Get a secure, single-use URL that allows customers to access their Web Billing customer portal. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Returns the AuthenticatedManagementUrl.

tools.name: subscriptions_entitlements_list-subscription
tools.description: Lists all Entitlements granted by a Subscription. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListEntitlements.

tools.name: subscriptions_transactions_get-play-store-or-app-store-subscription
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read . This endpoint belongs to the Customer Information domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20), sort (default: id) (plus 1 more). Returns the ListSubscriptionTransaction.

params.name: sort
params.description: Column to sort the result list by.

params.name: direction
params.description: Sort direction for the result list.

tools.name: subscriptions_transactions_refund-play-store-or-galaxy-subscription
tools.description: Refund and cancel a Play Store or Galaxy subscription's transaction. Access to the subscription will be revoked. This endpoint requires the following permission(s): customer_information:subscriptions:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Subscription Transactions Refunds domain, which has a default rate limit of 480 requests per minute . Required: project_id, subscription_id, transaction_id. Returns the new SubscriptionTransaction.

params.name: transaction_id
params.description: Identifier of the transaction in the store

tools.name: virtual-currencies_create-virtual-currency
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, code, name. Optional: description, product_grants. Returns the new VirtualCurrency.

params.name: code
params.description: The unique code for this virtual currency

params.name: name
params.description: The display name of the virtual currency

params.name: product_grants
params.description: Product grants that define how products grant this virtual currency

tools.name: virtual-currencies_delete-virtual-currency
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, virtual_currency_code. Returns the DeletedObject. Destructive.

tools.name: virtual-currencies_get-virtual-currency
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, virtual_currency_code. Returns the VirtualCurrency.

tools.name: virtual-currencies_list
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id. Optional: starting_after, limit (default: 20). Returns the ListVirtualCurrencies.

tools.name: virtual-currencies_update-virtual-currency
tools.description: This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, virtual_currency_code. Optional: description, name, product_grants. Returns the new VirtualCurrency.

params.name: name
params.description: The display name of the virtual currency

params.name: product_grants
params.description: Product grants that define how products grant this virtual currency

tools.name: virtual-currencies_actions_archive-virtual-currency
tools.description: Archives a virtual currency (makes it inactive). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, virtual_currency_code. Returns the new VirtualCurrency.

tools.name: virtual-currencies_actions_unarchive-virtual-currency
tools.description: Unarchives a virtual currency (makes it active). This endpoint requires the following permission(s): project_configuration:virtual_currencies:read_write . This endpoint belongs to the Project Configuration domain, which has a default rate limit of 60 requests per minute . Required: project_id, virtual_currency_code. Returns the new VirtualCurrency.
